title: Suren's Sophisticated Storage
description: Do you prefer a more aesthetically pleasing chest design?
body:
Do you prefer a more aesthetically pleasing chest design? **About Texture pack ›** This project aims to refresh and improve the visual aspects of the crates from the mod Sophisticated Storage, many similar mods already have such texture packs, unfortunately at the moment I have not found any alternatives to Sophisticated Storage.  **About Me ›** This is my first ever texturepack that I created to improve my own gameplay. There are many great mods that unfortunately have textures that are unpleasant to the eye, therefore the community creates just such texturepacks that improve the aesthetics of the game and this project is one of them. It was created with my own gameplay in mind, but I decided to share it with you. --- **Done:** **›** Single chests,
**›** Double chests,
**›** Single chests tiers,
**›** Double chests tiers
**Work in progress:** **›** Dyeable chests,
**›** Barrels,
**›** Barrel tiers,
**›** Shulkers,
**›** Shulker tiers,
**›** Item textures,
**›** Emissive textures (?)
